emails.subject: Sun Devil Meeting
emails.body: Sun Devil Meeting Kim, Kevin would like to have a 1 hour meeting either Tuesday or Wednesday and have all the Sun Devil Commercial people attend. I'm not sure who all that involves, but would you either forward this to them with a request for availability or tell me who to poll. Thanks for your assistance with this.

emails.subject: RE: Sun Devil Meeting
emails.body: RE: Sun Devil Meeting Susan, This meeting for Sun Devil would involve: Lorraine Lindberg Michelle Lokay Mark McConnell Paul Y'Barbo Kim Watson Thanks, Kim. P.S. Wed looks better than Tues for me. Thanks, K. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Sun Devil Meeting
emails.body: RE: Sun Devil Meeting Susan, also include Steve Harris. Thanks, Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly
